description: Search and fetch ~800K Federal Reserve economic time-series from the FRED API via MCP.
name: io.github.cyanheads/federal-reserve-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: FRED API key from stlouisfed.org. Required to make any API calls.
environmentVariables.name: FRED_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the FRED API base URL.
environmentVariables.name: FRED_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Sliding TTL for DataCanvas-registered observation tables (seconds).
environmentVariables.name: FRED_DATASET_TTL_SECONDS

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to expose the fedreserve_dataframe_drop tool.
environmentVariables.name: FRED_DATAFRAME_DROP_ENABLED

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
